---
title: "wireframe.qmd"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/wireframe.qmd"
loc: 188
complexity: 1
logic_score: 10.00
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 10.00
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 10.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 90 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://docs/architecture/FOLDER_MAP.qmd)
- [*](file://tasks.qmd)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
